channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Angel Reese pays off mother's mortgage in surprise birthday gift
item.description: WNBA star Angel Reese surprised her mom to paying off her mortgage as a birthday gift during a recent episode of Reese's "Unapologetically Angel" podcast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs potential Super Bowl celebrations will not feature public rally following 2024 mass shooting: report
item.description: If the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Philadelphia Eagles in Super Bowl LIX next weekend, fans will not get a public rally as part of those celebrations, according to one report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Laid-Back Pat: As the Chiefs chase Super Bowl history, Patrick Mahomes exudes a steadying calm
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes felt as though he needed to apologize after he helped the Kansas City Chiefs beat the Buffalo Bills in the AFC championship game, punching their ticket to the Super Bowl for the third consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Take it from locals: Super experience in New Orleans entails more than just the French Quarter
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Desiring a more local taste of Big Easy life during Super Bowl week? There's plenty to explore both in and outside the city center. Streetcar lines roll to Uptown, Mid-City or City Park. A ferry crosses the Mississippi River to Algiers Point.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Each of the young figure skaters killed in the DC plane crash had a story waiting to be told
item.description: The young figure skaters whose lives were cut tragically short Wednesday night when an American Airlines flight collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River were just beginning their journeys to stardom.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: TONIGHT! Road to the Big Game: See you at the Superdome Edition
item.description: The Eagles are once again headed to the biggest football game in the history of civilization! Join Eagles legend Seth Joyner and ABC27 Sports Director Allie Berube as they look look ahead to the game we've been dreaming about all season. Go Birds.
item.dc:creator: M. Anthony, PHL 17

item.title: Hall of Famer Dwyane Wade reveals 2023 kidney surgery to remove tumor later found to be cancerous
item.description: Hall of Fame player Dwyane Wade says doctors performed a December 2023 surgery on his kidney to remove a tumor later determined to be cancerous.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NFL says it will look into allegations by massage therapists about Justin Tucker's behavior
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — The NFL will look into allegations that Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker behaved inappropriately toward massage therapists at four spas and wellness centers in the Baltimore area, a league spokesman said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Arch Manning says Peyton and Eli gave him wedgies and bullied him to make him tougher
item.description: Texas Longhorns quarterback Arch Manning said he has been bullied by his famous uncles Peyton and Eli, and they have even given him wedgies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-NBA star Austin Carr takes swipe at Trump while congratulating Cavs All-Stars
item.description: Former Cleveland Cavaliers star Austin Carr called to impeach President Donald Trump in a post on social media on Thursday as he congratulated the team's All-Stars.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boston skating club trained Olympic champions. It has also shared in the sport's pain
item.description: NORWOOD, Mass. (AP) — The history of the Skating Club of Boston is the history of American figure skating – in good times and in bad.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dismal second period costs Sharks in blowout loss to Seattle Kraken
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks lose to the Seattle Kraken at Climate Pledge Arena; face Montreal Canadiens at home on Tuesday
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: MMA fighter praises Hitler, calls him a 'good guy' in podcast
item.description: UFC fighter Bryce Mitchell praised Adolf Hitler and denied the Holocaust happened in the first episode of his new podcast.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, Fox 5

item.title: New Raiders coach Pete Carroll retains defensive coordinator Patrick Graham, AP source says
item.description: HENDERSON, Nev. (AP) — Las Vegas Raiders coach Pete Carroll has retained defensive coordinator Patrick Graham, a person familiar with the decision said Thursday. The person spoke to The Associated Press on condition of anonymity because the team didn't announce the move.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: World champion Russian skaters on American Airlines jet built a new life as coaches in the US
item.description: TALLINN, Estonia (AP) — The two Russian figure skating coaches killed in the American Airlines crash were two-time Olympians and former world champions in the pairs event. They were also a married couple with a son who finished fourth last week at the U.S. national championships in Wichita, Kansas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Basketball: Francis Parker 46, La Jolla Country Day 45
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO) - Marquee matchup out at Francis Parker as they play host to La Jolla Country Day. Francis Parker's Brianna Mendez and Isabella Riddle would combine for 28 points on the night, leading the charge in their 46-45 win over La Jolla Country Day.. a feat some may had not seen coming.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, ending her 11-year run with Phoenix
item.description: Brittney Griner plans to sign with the Atlanta Dream, marking the end of her 11-year career with the Phoenix Mercury.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator, according to a person familiar with the situation.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bucs QB Baker Mayfield to make second Pro Bowl appearance
item.description: Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield was named to the 2025 Pro Bowl Games on Tuesday, marking his second appearance in two years.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl LIX matchup set
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The stage is set for Super Bowl 59, with two heavyweights ready to clash: the Kansas City Chiefs and the Philadelphia Eagles. The game will feature marquee stars Patrick Mahomes, Jalen Hurts, Travis Kelce, and Saquon Barkley.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jayden Daniels auctioning off custom jacket; proceeds to benefit LAFD
item.description: Jayden Daniels may be focusing on Sunday’s NFC Championship matchup against the Philadelphia Eagles, but he doesn’t forget about where he came from. In the wake of the devastating Los Angeles area wildfires, Daniels, a San Bernardino native, is auctioning off a personalized jacket.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Saunders, Demin lead BYU past Cincinnati, 80-52
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Behind its best shooting half of the season, BYU outscored Cincinnati by 23 in the second half en route to 80-52 victory over the Bearcats on Saturday evening at the Marriott Center. “We have a lot of good shooters," BYU head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
